title: Button triggered automation to create a new board based on a template, but inherit the item name to name the board
excerpt:

posts.author: cfisher (Chuck F)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve sorted out how to create a new board based on a button press, and link that to a template board creation.

What I’d like to do though, is have the Item Name then become the name of the board. Current behavior is that it creates the board called “New board”, which I then have to change manually.

Is this level of automation achievable?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @cfisher

Welcome to the community!

There is a little plus sign where you enter the name of the board and that allows you to slect columns on the item that triggered the board creation (e.g. Item Name)
